Community Riding Program Registration Packet

WARNING: THIS PACKET AFFECTS PARTICIPANT ACCESS, LIABILITY, AND EMERGENCY CONTACT EXPECTATIONS. READ IT CAREFULLY BEFORE SIGNING.

Participant information:

List the participant name, birth date, guardian name if applicable, email address, and one phone number that will be reachable on the day of the event.

Emergency contact:

Provide one emergency contact who is not attending the ride. Include the contact name, relationship, phone number, and any relevant pickup notes.

Accessibility checklist:

State whether the participant needs mounting assistance, quieter staging space, a visual schedule, medication reminders, or a support person on site.

Required acknowledgments:

Confirm that the participant understands helmet rules, animal-contact limits, weather cancellation policies, and the need to report injuries immediately to staff.

Signature block:

Print participant or guardian name, sign, date the packet, and note whether photo consent is granted for event recap materials.
